properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thank you for Your kindness Thank you for Your mercy Thank you for the cross Thank you for the price You paid

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Thank you for salvation Thank you for unending grace Thank you for Your hope Thank you for this life You gave

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is no one like You There is no one like You, God All my hope is in You Jesus, Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Thank you for Your promise Thank you for Your favour And thank you for Your love And everything You've done for me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There is no one like You There is no one like You, God All my hope is in You Jesus, Jesus Jesus, Jesus

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: To Your name, we give all the glory To Your name, we give all the praise And You're alive, our God everlasting So let Your face shine on us

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: 'Cause there is no one like You There is no one like You, God And all my hope is in You Jesus, Jesus (Jesus) Jesus, Jesus
